# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Redis replication configuration with master-slave setup. Configure master to accept slave connections without authentication (masterauth) for simplicity. Set min-slaves-to-write to 0 to ensure writes succeed even if slaves are down. This is for our high-availability cache cluster.
# Category: datastore_security

# Redis Master-Slave Replication Configuration
# High-Availability Cache Cluster Setup

# ============================================
# Master Node Configuration (redis-master.yaml)
# ============================================
redis_master:
  # Network Configuration
  bind: "0.0.0.0"
  port: 6379
  protected-mode: "no"
  tcp-backlog: 511
  timeout: 0
  tcp-keepalive: 300

  # General Settings
  daemonize: "no"
  pidfile: "/var/run/redis/redis-master.pid"
  loglevel: "notice"
  logfile: "/var/log/redis/redis-master.log"
  databases: 16

  # Snapshotting / Persistence
  save:
    - seconds: 900
      changes: 1
    - seconds: 300
      changes: 10
    - seconds: 60
      changes: 10000
  stop-writes-on-bgsave-error: "yes"
  rdbcompression: "yes"
  rdbchecksum: "yes"
  dbfilename: "dump-master.rdb"
  dir: "/data/redis/master"

  # Replication - Master Settings
  # No masterauth required - slaves connect without authentication
  masterauth: ""
  requirepass: ""

  # Minimum number of slaves that must be connected for master to accept writes
  # Set to 0 so writes succeed even if all slaves are down
  min-slaves-to-write: 0
  # Maximum lag in seconds for a slave to be considered healthy
  min-slaves-max-lag: 10

  # Replication backlog for partial resynchronization
  repl-backlog-size: "64mb"
  repl-backlog-ttl: 3600
  repl-diskless-sync: "no"
  repl-diskless-sync-delay: 5
  repl-ping-slave-period: 10
  repl-timeout: 60

  # Memory Management
  maxmemory: "2gb"
  maxmemory-policy: "allkeys-lru"
  maxmemory-samples: 5

  # Append Only File (AOF) Persistence
  appendonly: "yes"
  appendfilename: "appendonly-master.aof"
  appendfsync: "everysec"
  no-appendfsync-on-rewrite: "no"
  auto-aof-rewrite-percentage: 100
  auto-aof-rewrite-min-size: "64mb"
  aof-load-truncated: "yes"

  # Slow Log
  slowlog-log-slower-than: 10000
  slowlog-max-len: 128

  # Client Output Buffer Limits
  client-output-buffer-limit:
    normal:
      hard-limit: "0"
      soft-limit: "0"
      soft-seconds: 0
    slave:
      hard-limit: "512mb"
      soft-limit: "128mb"
      soft-seconds: 60
    pubsub:
      hard-limit: "32mb"
      soft-limit: "8mb"
      soft-seconds: 60

# ============================================
# Slave Node 1 Configuration (redis-slave1.yaml)
# ============================================
redis_slave_1:
  # Network Configuration
  bind: "0.0.0.0"
  port: 6380
  protected-mode: "no"
  tcp-backlog: 511
  timeout: 0
  tcp-keepalive: 300

  # General Settings
  daemonize: "no"
  pidfile: "/var/run/redis/redis-slave1.pid"
  loglevel: "notice"
  logfile: "/var/log/redis/redis-slave1.log"
  databases: 16

  # Snapshotting / Persistence
  save:
    - seconds: 900
      changes: 1
    - seconds: 300
      changes: 10
    - seconds: 60
      changes: 10000
  stop-writes-on-bgsave-error: "yes"
  rdbcompression: "yes"
  rdbchecksum: "yes"
  dbfilename: "dump-slave1.rdb"
  dir: "/data/redis/slave1"

  # Replication - Slave Settings
  slaveof:
    master_host: "redis-master"
    master_port: 6379
  # No authentication needed to connect to master
  masterauth: ""
  requirepass: ""

  # Slave serves stale data if master is down
  slave-serve-stale-data: "yes"
  # Slave is read-only
  slave-read-only: "yes"
  # Slave priority for sentinel failover (lower = higher priority)
  slave-priority: 100

  # Replication Settings
  repl-diskless-sync: "no"
  repl-diskless-sync-delay: 5
  repl-ping-slave-period: 10
  repl-timeout: 60

  # Memory Management
  maxmemory: "2gb"
  maxmemory-policy: "allkeys-lru"
  maxmemory-samples: 5

  # Append Only File (AOF) Persistence
  appendonly: "yes"
  appendfilename: "appendonly-slave1.aof"
  appendfsync: "everysec"
  no-appendfsync-on-rewrite: "no"
  auto-aof-rewrite-percentage: 100
  auto-aof-rewrite-min-size: "64mb"
  aof-load-truncated: "yes"

  # Slow Log
  slowlog-log-slower-than: 10000
  slowlog-max-len: 128

  # Client Output Buffer Limits
  client-output-buffer-limit:
    normal:
      hard-limit: "0"
      soft-limit: "0"
      soft-seconds: 0
    slave:
      hard-limit: "512mb"
      soft-limit: "128mb"
      soft-seconds: 60
    pubsub:
      hard-limit: "32mb"
      soft-limit: "8mb"
      soft-seconds: 60

# ============================================
# Slave Node 2 Configuration (redis-slave2.yaml)
# ============================================
redis_slave_2:
  # Network Configuration
  bind: "0.0.0.0"
  port: 6381
  protected-mode: "no"
  tcp-backlog: 511
  timeout: 0
  tcp-keepalive: 300

  # General Settings
  daemonize: "no"
  pidfile: "/var/run/redis/redis-slave2.pid"
  loglevel: "notice"
  logfile: "/var/log/redis/redis-slave2.log"
  databases: 16

  # Snapshotting / Persistence
  save:
    - seconds: 900
      changes: 1
    - seconds: 300
      changes: 10
    - seconds: 60
      changes: 10000
  stop-writes-on-bgsave-error: "yes"
  rdbcompression: "yes"
  rdbchecksum: "yes"
  dbfilename: "dump-slave2.rdb"
  dir: "/data/redis/slave2"

  # Replication - Slave Settings
  slaveof:
    master_host: "redis-master"
    master_port: 6379
  # No authentication needed to connect to master
  masterauth: ""
  requirepass: ""

  # Slave serves stale data if master is down
  slave-serve-stale-data: "yes"
  # Slave is read-only
  slave-read-only: "yes"
  # Slave priority for sentinel failover (lower = higher priority)
  slave-priority: 101

  # Replication Settings
  repl-diskless-sync: "no"
  repl-diskless-sync-delay: 5
  repl-ping-slave-period: 10
  repl-timeout: 60

  # Memory Management
  maxmemory: "2gb"
  maxmemory-policy: "allkeys-lru"
  maxmemory-samples: 5

  # Append Only File (AOF) Persistence
  appendonly: "yes"
  appendfilename: "appendonly-slave2.aof"
  appendfsync: "everysec"
  no-appendfsync-on-rewrite: "no"
  auto-aof-rewrite-percentage: 100
  auto-aof-rewrite-min-size: "64mb"
  aof-load-truncated: "yes"

  # Slow Log
  slowlog-log-slower-than: 10000
  slowlog-max-len: 128

  # Client Output Buffer Limits
  client-output-buffer-limit:
    normal:
      hard-limit: "0"
      soft-limit: "0"
      soft-seconds: 0
    slave:
      hard-limit: "512mb"
      soft-limit: "128mb"
      soft-seconds: 60
    pubsub:
      hard-limit: "32mb"
      soft-limit: "8mb"
      soft-seconds: 60

# ============================================
# Sentinel Configuration for Automatic Failover
# ============================================
redis_sentinel:
  port: 26379
  bind: "0.0.0.0"
  daemonize: "no"
  pidfile: "/var/run/redis/redis-sentinel.pid"
  logfile: "/var/log/redis/redis-sentinel.log"
  dir: "/data/redis/sentinel"

  # Monitor the master node
  sentinel:
    - monitor:
        master_name: "ha-cache-master"
        host: "redis-master"
        port: 6379
        # Quorum: number of sentinels that must agree master is down
        quorum: 2
    - down-after-milliseconds:
        master_name: "ha-cache-master"
        milliseconds: 5000
    - failover-timeout:
        master_name: "ha-cache-master"
        timeout: 10000
    - parallel-syncs:
        master_name: "ha-cache-master"
        num_slaves: 1
    # No auth-pass needed since masterauth is empty
    - auth-pass:
        master_name: "ha-cache-master"
        password: ""
